reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The pool area
reviews.negatives: The hygiene and food

reviews.title: Loved every minute
reviews.text:
I loved the stay here. From before we got there the staff was super helpful. Our Guest Experience Manager was very sweet and made the best first impression. She messaged before we got there about arrival time and bedding preference.

From when we arrived, eveything was great. From the housekeeping staff, to the staff at the pool area and spa. The staff at Al Khiran were very helpful and friendly. The food was not only beautiful but great quality and delicious. 

Special thanks to Mr. Salem, Mr. Ali at Al Khiran and Ms. Ceren Gumus, our Guest Experience Manager for making our stay so memorable and special. I can't wait to come back and tell all my friends to stay here!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 2 Twin, Mountain view, High floor, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: The location is amazing.
reviews.text: Although it is far from tourist attractions, it is perfect for a relaxing time surrounded by the sea and mountains. Meals at the restaurant are expensive, but delicious, and considering the seaside location, I am satisfied. However, the room is a bit small. Sometimes the shower water doesn't come out, the flow of water from the bathtub and sink is poor, although I reserved for three people, there are only amenities and cups for two, they prepare fruits in the room but there are no knives or plates to eat them, and so forth, there are some troubles. I called the front desk numerous times, but the staff are always cheerful and kind, and respond quickly. The breakfast is also excellent. Everything is delicious, and the menu changes slightly every day, so I don’t think I’ll get bored. It's nice that there is a coffee maker in the room, allowing me to enjoy delicious coffee anytime. I want to go again.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest Room, 2 Twin, Sea View, High Floor, Balcony

reviews.title: Nostalgic hotel, nice for a few days
reviews.positives: Pool selection and breakfast really nice and staff extremely accommodating
reviews.negatives: Beach isnt the best, its disappointingly dirty, I took myself and the kids and we did a quick 10-15minute litter pick and came back with almost 20 plastic bottles and rubbish. The hotel its self is grand but in need of renovating and updating, it feels like a step back in time. The bathrooms are extremely small, you would not want to do more than a few days in that set up... AC is also abit dated. I dont think I would stay there again until its fully refurbed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: All good👍

reviews.title: Different experience not your usual 5 star hotel
reviews.positives: Location is great for short getaway from the busy streets. Beautiful green gardens surrounded by mountains.

reviews.title: Amazing Hotel and Staff
reviews.text: We’ve stayed at some pretty nice 5 star hotels all over the world, so we can confidently say Al Bustan Palace is one of the best all around hotels out there. From the facilities and location to the staff, everything was absolutely wonderful. Also, if you’re traveling with small kids, they have a great outdoor kids aquatic facility as well. The pictures online don’t do it justice, frankly. Hope to return someday!

reviews.title: Beautiful resort. For a Ritz Carlton standard, would expect rooms to be upgraded too
reviews.positives:
The staff was superb and accomodating. Yayha upon checkin personalized our experience. Maria the manager was also super nice to helping in helping meet our needs and expectations.
The resort gives a feel of grandeur and opulence as you drive up to it, and even in the lobby area, the high ceiling of chandeliers and decor was impressive.
reviews.negatives: There was emanating odor of dampness in the room we stayed in, which was quite different to nice incense arimas in lobby areas. Renovations of the main restaurant are underway so will improve this aspect.

reviews.title: An Unforgettable experience
reviews.text: This has been so far the best hotel I have ever visited!where shouldvI start?friendly and very helpful staff who make you feel warm and welcome.There is something for everyone from.zipline to swimming pools to the ladies beach that give us ladies the ability to enjoy ourselves while holidaying.The breakfast was scrumptious and healthy food options were abundant for those health conscious individuals like me.Thank you so much Al Bustan for making this a memorable experience for me and my family.Am definitely visiting again!

reviews.title: WONDERFUL
reviews.positives:
I had a truly wonderful stay at this resort. Everything was perfect from start to finish. The food was excellent with a wide variety at the buffet, the service and attention from the staff were outstanding, and they were kind enough to offer us a late check-out.

The spa was absolutely top-notch, the beach was simply amazing, and the room had a breathtaking view. The activities and overall atmosphere made the experience even more enjoyable.

Everything was perfect — I couldn’t have asked for a better stay!

reviews.title: higher than 5 stars if possible
reviews.text:
not the first time we stayed here, before we were with friends, now we were with family on vacation here in Oman.
as always the staff were so nice, from the gentlemen opening the doors when we enter, to the reception when we checked in, bellboys who took our luggage to our rooms, kitchen/restaurant people for our meals, cleaners we meet at the corridors, lawn, etc.
our family did really enjoyed their stay here.it was unforgettable experience for them.
we would like to personally thank the main MAN, our angel in disguise, Mr. Nawaf Al Mudhafar, our biggest thanks are reserved for you.
if you have any concerns, go talk to this kind man.he will do whatever he can to accomodate you.
again, thanks to all the staff, and you will definutely see us again.😊

reviews.title: Magical
reviews.text:
We soon forgot about some detailed criticisms of the hotel to enjoy one of the most magical hotel experiences together at the Ritz Al Bustan. As we lay on the beach, the soft Arabian Sea breeze blew away all of our worries from our busy lives. The food was very good and the pools divine. The large moon rising over the mountain during dinner, impossible to forget. 
On a practical note, our 10 & 13 year old adored our room that dropped off into the lagoon pools. We all played tennis together, went to the gym and paddle boarding. It was a place that bought the family together. A  year later, we are still yearning to return.
reviews.room_type: deluxe guest room, 2 twin, ground floor, lagoon access, patio

reviews.title: Would definitely book AGAIN!
reviews.positives: We were a group of girls wanting a getaway & we made the best best decision to come to al bustan, such a great place and the girls beach was the cherry on top. Loved everything about the hotel and the service was 10/10

reviews.title: One of the best!
reviews.text:
My family stayed in this hotel for my son's 3rd birthday. Great experience is an understatement. We enjoyed our tine in the hotel. From the time we parked in front of the hotel, their wonderful service started, we were greeted and assisted by the hospitable staff.The hotel
lobby was amazing, spacious and instagramable. I would like to mention that their common comfort room is one of the cleanest i have seen so far. 

Id like to thank Yahyah and Rahwan for being so kind, patient and polite as they  expedited the check in process and for giving us a perfect room. A huge shout out to miss Katherina if guest relations for making my son's birthday extra special. I requested for a small cake but their team went the extra mile and decorated the room with my son's favorite planets, he was indeed surprised and happy.

Their rooms are spacious, clean and have all the things you would expect and not expect(positive way) in a hotel. The view from the room is relaxing.

The facilities are family friendly and enjoyable. The land area is wide which means even in this pandemic sicial
distancing can be practiced. You have alot of options on where to swim , they have several pools. Their family area is unique and better than others hotels. they have a slide in a pool which is safe for toddlers. The playground has many options too. They have cool facilities for adults as well, a fitness center and tennis court were among the places i saw. We had a wonderful and enjoyable experience as a family.

Food was ok, same as other hotels, however i have noticed that the sausage is different and better than the same rubber like sausage other hotels serve. lol. The filipina staff was also kind and warm. 

Overall, Al bustan palace is one of the best. We enjoyed every single minute we were there. Thank you to all of the people who made my son's birthday memorable!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 1 King, Sea view, High floor, Balcony

reviews.title: I’ll be more than happy to come back

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: The bedroom gets wet when taking a shower, I called 3 times to bring toilet paper, which I arrived was not available.  I had to walk to the parking lot to get my car, it was very hot.  Some staf were not nice.  The carpet was not clean.  Simple breakfast, little bread option.  The room's acoustic is not good, I heard children crying all night long.  When we arrived they were not offered water at check-in.  I don't know if it's always like this, but it wasn't worth the amount paid and I won't be back.

reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.text:
Hotel lobby was amazing with it's luxurious interiors, although no one would check us upon entering (temperature check), we just went straight to the reception desk.
Room seems clean and fresh, some old minimal stain on the bed sheet otherwise everything was good, had a wonderful sleep.
Breakfast buffet was a bit less on variety.
Facilities were nice, the pool and activity areas for the kids can be enjoyed even by adults.

reviews.title: Family with young child
reviews.text: The place was very good, they even upgraded our room which was very nice and thankful for that.  But i was disappointed with the bathroom amenities considering that they are 5 star hotel.  There were no toothbrush, no enough bathrobe and slippers.  They should checked first these things before they will let the  next guest checked - in.  The selection for breakfast were very few.  But still we enjoyed our stay.

reviews.title: What I disliked about the hotel that’s the restaurants are overpriced since we are in a secluded area then the downtown.
reviews.positives: The hotel had amazing views of the beach and pool.
reviews.negatives: What I disliked about the hotel that’s the restaurants are overpriced since we are in a secluded area then the downtown. So you are obligated to pay an overly expensive price for the food. As it didn’t have other options. The staff weren’t very welcoming when we arrived at the hotel , they are also not very clear about anything in the hotel even when we asked questions they didn’t give interest of answering us. The staff didn’t really know how to communicate or let us know about the hotel much we had to find things on our own and our last days of staying.

reviews.title: Enticing place to relax with your young children
reviews.text: Family friendly hotel, unluckily we weren’t able to use the infinity pool bec. it was under maintenance. But the other amenities where our kids enjoyed a lot. Our breakfast was a la carte, hmmm eggggggsss a lot of it... bette if it was a buffet.

reviews.title: Two night staycation
reviews.text: We chose the Al Bustan as it was nice and close and we had stayed at the Shangri La previously.  The hotel is lovely and despite the C19 safety procedures it was very relaxing.  We particularly liked the fact that one can be in the pool shaded by palm trees a feature I have not seen at other hotels apart from maybe the Chedi.  The children's waterpark was very popular with the kids as well.  They managed to provide a good buffet for breakfast and dinner with good safety measures in place allowing a good choice although not the full monty.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Mid floor, Balcony

reviews.title: I would definetly visit it again.
reviews.positives: I love our stay at Al Bustan. Everything was so perfect. The staff, the food, the atmosphere, the kids area, every corner at this hotel had its own spark. My 3 year old boy enjoyed his time as well.

reviews.title: What a holiday!
reviews.positives:
We spent 6 nights and it ticked all the boxes! 

1. Amazing facilities
2. Kids club was great and staff really made an effort to entertain my toddler, which meant we could relax and get some down time 
3. Kids pool and adult pools top notch 
4. I went to the gym everyday and enjoyed the steam & sauna 
5. Great choices for restaurants 

I will be certainly coming back again!

reviews.title: Extreme luxury
reviews.text: Only Problem we had is when we arrived we were told that the room was not available. We do not know what the issue exactly was (maybe something with check-in time, according to Homepage it is 14:00h and we were there at 14:15h - to me is seems that 14:00h is the earliest and we should not have been there before as room would not have been ready). No problem for the staff who already had a solution for that. They upgraded our booking to a different category and therefore instead of a normal Deluxe Room we got to stay the night in a Suite (marvellous!).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Fantastic attention to detail by the staff

reviews.title: Enjoying the stay
reviews.text: It was so good stay but my kids didn't enjoy as we exacted.  Because there is no kids playing facilities. .. we really appreciate the stuff...upgraded my room from mountain view to see view for free...

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: The food was not good. It was Mediterranean night but not even a single Mediterranean food was there. Japanese and Arabic food were served, and not enough selection. But commendation to restaurant staff Misbah and Prandeep and companions from the pool bar for their attentive services.

reviews.title: 5 star location with 3 star dining
reviews.text: This is still the best hotel in Muscat and probably one of the best in the world. The location is simply superb. I can't understand why anyone would want to stay at Bar al Jissah or the Chedi. On this occasion our stay was spilt by the very poor set menu at the beach restaurant on Valentine's night. Ritz Carlton should do much better than this.
reviews.positives: Location, comfort, ambiance

reviews.title: Unforgettable stay
reviews.positives: Our stay was absolutely exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed and cared for, making it one of the best experiences we've ever had especially with our little baby. The hotel itself is luxurious, and the view of the ocean mountains and palm trees were incredible. The food was outstanding, but what truly made our stay unforgettable was the incredible staff. A special thank you to Ali, who went above and beyond during breakfast with his hospitality and generosity. His kindness made our mornings even more special. We can’t wait to return!

reviews.title: honey moon
reviews.text: allowed us for early cheak in, our room was not ready but they provided us other vacant room within same book specification. they also provide us a free honeymoon services without any additional cost. Most of residents spend there honeymoon  at this hotel.
reviews.positives: excellent service's, great custmer value, quick custmer responsiveness

reviews.title: An experience that you will not forget.
reviews.positives: Loved everything. We have stayed here 2 times now and you cannot fault anything.  The breakfast buffet is the best I have ever had anywhere, and the Spa retreat area is very special.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: A First Class hotel in a stunning location
reviews.text: Top-drawer all around. The hotel is a remarkable building in a glorious setting. Staff were excellent from the moment we reached the front door, proper 5 star service. This was a quieter and more refined, slightly older crowd than at the Al-Bandar hotel we had stayed at previously in the trip.
reviews.positives: The hotel building - lobby to rooms, staff service, beach and garden location

reviews.title: Special thanks to guest relations for taking care of our stay
reviews.positives: The welcoming , room upgrade and special arrangement
reviews.negatives: The dinner was uncomfortable due to the wedding party next to the restaurant

reviews.title: Fine atomosphere but very far away from city
reviews.text: It's a good experience, all things were ok, except the location that you have to pay minimum 25$ for taxi, no supermarkets around to buy your things, unless you go to the city center. Loved the food though they have a weird rules not to wear a short pant while you're eating at their restaurants !!!
reviews.positives: Views, food, service

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: My stay was flawless and excellent in every detail, including the pool, breakfast, room, amenities, spa, staff, and service. We enjoyed a wonderfully relaxing New Year getaway.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: gorgeous hotel
reviews.text:
we spent 2 nights in Al bustan one of whch was the New Year's Eve.
Our spacious, luxury room was looking at the pool and the palm trees where you see lots of parakits, swallows and starlings. Mini bar was complimantory which made us feel at home. Everything is very well thought of in this hotel. The staff is very professional, friendly and very polite.We enjoyed the hotel in great extent and would like to come again!
Inside the hotel everything is beatifully designed and decorated, apart from the hotel building itself.It is a boring gray piece of concrete whihc doesn't look like a palace before you go in.But once you're in you forget all about it :)
reviews.positives: luxury

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location, Reception staff, Spa massage and breakfast buffet/service were amazing

reviews.title: Beautiful garden/parc hotel at sea
reviews.text:
A beautiful hotel. Quietly situated in old muscat.
A hotel lobby like a cathedral with lots of francinsence smelling....

Nice HIgh Tea at 3pm untill 5pm every day.

Arabic free coffee to try at the arabic tent in the lobby.

Free shuttle service twice daily.

Great food at restaurants. Very nice rooms with balcony.

Less: cleaning could be better and beds( matrasses)are too soft.
reviews.positives: Lovely garden/parc and romantic swimming pools

reviews.title: A very bad experience never again since it’s a ritz Carlton hotel we expected a much better service
reviews.positives: Location and was beautiful
reviews.negatives:
Upon arrival nobody served us a welcome drinks n no availability of the local coffee Qahwa 
Room internet was extremely slow - we called them many times and they said they will fix it but nobody returned our calls 
Since I couldn’t work I lost a lot of money and I couldn’t connect for my important meetings and my wife who is an influencer also lost money 
Restaurant staff was not friendly @ Ajami and couldn’t comprehend our request 
The room was very simple for what we paid for and old furniture and not spacious

reviews.title: Beautiful location
reviews.text: We had to wait for over 3and a half hours after a 13 hour journey to get to a room. The room was not the one we were supposed to have. The front of desk manager was extremely unhelpful and we found out that we were supposed to read his mind when our cases had been whisked away and he said we could use the facilities. All we wanted was a shower and then to sit by the pool. In the end we lost a day of our holiday and were given a "rotten" room. By the middle of the week after several complaints we were upgraded to an amazing suite. Too much too late though.
reviews.positives: Location, weather

reviews.title: good for a get away from city noises but really hard on neves and mind peace
reviews.positives: the venue is nice and is good for a get away from the city for the beach and the garden walks
reviews.negatives: staff are really un professional, kitchen smells in the corridor , the breakfast was unpleasant experience , the room location was not the booked rooms , zero responcebilty and car about customer complain

reviews.title: Great hotel property, excellent staff performance.
reviews.text:
not only is this a superb hotel as far as location and setting are concerned but more importantly i found the staff performance. from check in to check out, one can say nothing but positives. guest relations in particular must be commended as not the simplest of request has escaped young susan, a guest relations officer from germany. attention to detail was the daily buzz word. from door man to lounge staff, from pool attendant to the f & b department all staff were committed to providing outstanding services to guests. 
definitely worth the visit.
reviews.positives: staff, staff, staff. their performance was outstanding.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.positives: Amazing hotel, enjoyed it so much, specially the ladies beach and the breakfast was above the expectations

reviews.title: Great Hotel. Good Staff. Old Computer Systems
reviews.text: easy parking with valet service if required. reception friendly, efficient and accurate. room size adequate. beds very comfortable with choice of pillow (pillow menu!).
reviews.positives: Pools, lawn area for sunbathing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
The level of service didn’t meet the standards of Ritz carlton hotel 
And all the restaurants even the beech canteen 
Had the same food menu just with different prices 
And the levels of food just average 

Second point at the beech no one to serve at the sunbed area and if you want to eat you have to go and eat in the canteen as the food not allowed at the sunbed area !! 

The breakfast puffet was ok even though I expected more variety

reviews.title: Sejour Ritz carlton Al Bustan Mascate
reviews.text:
Le Ritz Carton Al Bustan est un hotel digne des mille et une nuit et ceci dans un cadre exceptionnel entre montagne et mer. Il allie le charme d une architecture arabe notamment son hall tres impressionnant et le grand luxe/modernité de ses infrastructures.
Le parc et jardins sont somptueux et s intègre parfaitement dans ce decor mer/montagne. On a l impression de voyager dans le temps tout ayant des chambres et prestations luxueuses et modernes. Tout y est fait pour se sentir a l aise y compris l acceuil bien sûr du personnel qui est vraiment a l écoute. Je recommande si vous séjourner a Mascate.
reviews.room_type: deluxe guest room, 1 king, mountain view, high floor, balcony

reviews.title: Location wonderful and very helpful stuff lovely beach

The staff was very helpful and much friendly 
Location was wonderful 
Much respect and hospitality

reviews.positives: We enjoyed the ladies-only private beach the most, along with the other spa facilities.

reviews.title: Une expérience hors du commun!
reviews.text:
Très bel hôtel digne d’un 5 étoiles. 
Cadre et paysage magnifique, piscine à couper le souffle! 
Petit déjeuner très qualitatif! On y mange très très bien! 
Personnel aux petits soins, un grand grand merci à toutes et à tous! 
Chambre spacieuse et soigneusement de décorée. Nous avions pris côté pool/garden avec a accès à une piscine par le balcon.
reviews.room_type: deluxe guest room, 2 twin, ground floor, lagoon access, patio

reviews.title: Perfect and amazing loved everything about it
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Magnifique hôtel
reviews.text:
Nous avons passé 1 semaine dans cet hôtel qui est splendide. 
L'entrée de l'hôtel est majestueuse. 
Le personnel est serviable, agréable!!! 
Nous avions pris une chambre lagoon ce qui est top car depuis notre terrasse nous avions accès à une des piscine dit lagoon, cest génial. 
En cette période de juillet avec environ 40/45 degrés, leau n'est pas assez fraîche, la piscine devrait être climatisé, mais cest très agréable. 
Il y a une magnifique grande piscine à débordement. 
Les espaces autour de la piscine principale sont très agréable. 
Les restaurants sont super avec un petit-déjeuner très variés,  et le buffet du soirs est très bien avec des grillades à la demande. 
Il y a un espace piscine pour enfants très bien aménagé. 
Dommage que 2 des restaurants de l'hôtel étaient fermé,  je pense que cest parce que nous étions en hors saison, néanmoins nous aurions dû être informé avant. 
L'hôtel est plutôt bien placé ( environ 20mn des principales attractions). 
Hotel plus pour les couples
reviews.room_type: deluxe guest room, 1 king, ground floor, lagoon access, patio

reviews.title: The perfect weekend getaway
reviews.positives: The private beach for ladies is beautiful but rocky not soft sand, i loved the staff’s hospitality the most especially abdulla and taha.
reviews.negatives: It’s a bit old and the lobby doesn’t have any sunlight

reviews.title: Très bel hôtel
reviews.text:
Le personnel et les services sont parfaits. Nous avions une chambre lagon avec accès direct dans la piscine. C'est super. Par contre, les chambres sont petites, les salles de bains aussi. Pas de douche, uniquement une baignoire. Certains couloirs ne sont pas ceux d'un 5 étoiles.
La nourriture est correcte mais très chère
reviews.positives: Le personnel, les services, la piscine lagon

reviews.title: It was a first solo trip and I felt comfortable and looked after. The room was amazing. I would definitely stay here aga
reviews.positives: Staff were amazing.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Hotel très agréable avec un service à la hauteur
reviews.text:
Hotel à recommander car très plaisant.
Même si l'hotel est éloigné du centre de la ville, sa plage , piscine compense largement ce défaut éventuelle.
Le style manque peut être d'une touche féminine qui le rendrait irrésistible. Le petit déjeuner ainsi que le buffet sont très bien , le service au petit soin et la glacière avec 2 petites bouteilles d'eau fraiche données à chaque client lors de la prise des chaises longues un plus non négligeable.
reviews.positives: Servicee + plage de 1 Km

reviews.title: Hat sehr gut gefallen.
reviews.positives: Tennisplaetzen,Garten,Restaurant Beach Pavilion

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
A truly unforgettable experience at The Ritz-Carlton Al Bustan Palace in Muscat, Oman! From the moment I arrived, the Reception team's warm smiles and efficient check-in made me feel at home. The Front Desk staff were always attentive and helpful, exceeding my expectations.

The Pool Bar service was exceptional, with friendly staff constantly refilling my glass and offering refreshing treats. Room Service delivered delicious meals to my doorstep, always quick and ensuring to deliver all meals as fresh and presentable as possible. 

Housekeeping deserves special praise for their meticulous attention to detail, ensuring my room was always spotless and comfortable.

This solo retreat was truly rejuvenating, thanks to the exceptional care and hospitality of the entire team at The Ritz-Carlton Al Bustan Palace. I'm grateful for the memories and can't wait to return! 5/5 stars!

reviews.title: La perfezione
reviews.text: Gentilezza, efficienza, professionalità: tutto perfetto  dalla location alla spiaggia,  alla spa con terapisti fantastici. Colazione  superlativa

reviews.title: 무스캇 최고의 호텔
reviews.text:
알 부스탄은 오만의 수도 무스캇에서 가장 좋은 호텔입니다.
오만에서 근무하며 여러가지 호텔은 가봤지만 알 부스탄만한 호텔이 없습니다.
친절한 직원, 수려한 자연환경, 시내접근성...이름만큼이나 값어치를 하는 호텔입니다.

reviews.title: Perfect stay with good vibes allover this place
reviews.positives:
Everything was awesome, the hotel lobby is astonishing, facilities incredible clean, loved the infinity pool (were you can stay until very late in the evening) and also loved the room lightning system; the food, both the breakfast and dinner buffet were almost haute cusine/fine dining, not to mention the food in the Pavilion restaurant. Also the food at the pool bar was very good with lovely staff. All the staff was very attentive and well trained. 
My son was very happy to discover that on the beach, at low tide, there were very deep tide pools where he found lots of marine creatures and live beautiful corals. 
You can feel only good vibes allover this place.
reviews.negatives: N/A
